title: Neco Arc Mod
description:
Adds:
Neco Arc Mob
Pilk
Pepsi
body: My first ever mod that just adds a Neco Arc mob to the overworld, It doesnt drop anything but can be fed pilk, made of pepsi and milk. pepsi is also added. Both Pepsi and Pilk gives buffs but is mostly used to create more Neco Arcs. The only purpose of the mod was to learn how to create mods n just to have a fun n silly creature walking around the world. I thought other people would enjoy having the creature around their worlds as well so I have uploaded it.
